mapper.sql: select ct.template_id, ct.tenant_id, t.tenant_name, ct.template_name, ct.content_type, ct.publish_channel, ct.prompt_template, ct.status, ct.sort_order, ct.create_by, ct.create_time, ct.update_by, ct.update_time, ct.remark from sea_content_template ct left join sea_tenant t on ct.tenant_id = t.tenant_id
mapper.select:
AND ct.status = '0'
AND ct.content_type = #{contentType}
AND ct.publish_channel = #{publishChannel}
AND (ct.tenant_id = #{tenantId} OR ct.tenant_id = 1)
AND ct.tenant_id = 1
order by
case when ct.tenant_id = #{tenantId} then 0 else 1 end,
ct.sort_order asc, ct.template_id asc limit 1
mapper.delete:
delete from sea_content_template where template_id in
#{templateId}
